title: Use @Autowired only on a single constructor
description: Applying @Autowired to multiple constructors in a class can cause ambiguity for dependency injection in Spring. Only one constructor should be annotated with @Autowired to ensure clear and predictable bean creation. This prevents injection errors and improves code reliability.
recommendation: Annotate only one constructor with @Autowired in each class. Remove @Autowired from all but one constructor.

checks.message: Use @Autowired only on a single constructor. Found multiple @Autowired annotations.
